whenToUse.summary: Pre-frame and connect two related ideas before forwarding the visitor to a destination funnel the marketer may not own. Page 1 captures the email; Page 2 tells an Epiphany Bridge story/video and redirects to the main offer. Used by affiliates, network marketers, and anyone sending cold traffic that needs warming first.
goals: Warm cold traffic before an offer
Presell an affiliate / partner / network-marketing offer
Connect two ideas / bridge a belief gap
Capture the email before handing off
signals: You are sending traffic to an offer you do NOT control
Audience is not yet sold on the vehicle
A personal story is needed to connect the two ideas
doNotUseWhen: You own the offer and traffic is already warm (go direct)
There is no belief gap to bridge

pageStructure.purpose: Capture the email before the bridge so the lead is yours even if they bounce at the destination.
blocks: Curiosity headline tied to the bridge promise

pageStructure.purpose: Tell the Epiphany Bridge story (usually on video) and hand the warmed prospect off to the destination.
blocks: Outbound redirect button to the destination offer

pageStructure.purpose: Replaces Page 1 for fully cold traffic - a native article written at the audience's awareness level that ends in the opt-in.
blocks: Native-article headline in the audience's language
Story-led body bridging beliefs to the solution
Opt-in CTA entering a 30-60 day cold-to-warm nurture

copyFramework.script: Epiphany Bridge Script (Expert Secrets) - the canonical home of the Epiphany Bridge.
structure: The epiphany that led me to [the vehicle]
'Click here to see it for yourself' hand-off
copyFramework.notes: The bridge transfers YOUR belief in the vehicle to the prospect, so the destination offer (which you may not own) converts a pre-sold visitor.

primaryPersonaResolved.label: The Expert Guide
primaryPersonaResolved.author: Russell Brunson
owns_scripts: Epiphany Bridge Script (Backstory > Journey > New Opportunity > Framework > Achievement > Transformation)
Perfect Webinar (Big Domino + 3 Secrets + The Stack + Close)
primaryPersonaResolved.voice: Belief-shifting storytelling; transfer your conviction in the vehicle to the prospect.

supportingPersonasResolved.label: The Traffic Strategist
supportingPersonasResolved.author: Russell Brunson
supportingPersonasResolved.voice: Meet cold traffic at its awareness level and pre-frame before the offer.

pages: Step 2: Bridge page with outbound redirect
skill44Widgets: Outbound link button (destination/affiliate URL with UTM + affiliate params)
automations: Nurture sequence reusing the Epiphany Bridge
ghlBuild.notes: The redirect button opens the destination (often external). Pass tracking parameters. For cold traffic, swap Page 1 for the article pre-frame variant.
